description: Test jsonb_object_keys function which returns text keys from a JSONB object as a set
name: jsonb_object_keys_func
query_sql:
-- @name GetDocKeys
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, jsonb_object_keys(data) AS key_name FROM documents
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE documents (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, data JSONB NOT NULL, metadata JSONB);
